ddls:
CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., normal, fighting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Types that are super effective against this type */,
  "resistances" TEXT /* Types that are not very effective against this type */,
  "immunities" TEXT /* Types that have no effect on this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., physical, special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "physical_or_special" INTEGER /* Whether the category is physical or special */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_classes" (
  "damage_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage class */,
  "damage_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the damage class (e.g., physical, special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the damage class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the Pokémon */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* HP (Health Points) of the Pokémon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "special_attack" INTEGER /* Special Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "special_defense" INTEGER /* Special Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon */,
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon it evolves from */,
  "evolves_into_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon it evolves into */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon participating in the battle */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move used in the battle */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent Pokémon */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date the battle took place */,
  "battle_location" TEXT /* Location where the battle took place */,
  "battle_format" TEXT /* Format of the battle (e.g., single, double, tournament) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the battle */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain of the battle field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_pokemon" (
  "user_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's Pokémon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the Pokémon */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_pokemon_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_pokemon_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_outcomes" (
  "battle_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle outcome */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning Pokémon */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing Pokémon */,
  "battle_result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "winner_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the battle outcome (e.g., knockout, forfeit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_outcomes_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_outcomes" (
  "move_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move outcome */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move used */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the move (e.g., super effective, not very effective) */,
  "critical_hit" INTEGER /* Whether the move was a critical hit */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Amount of damage dealt by the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_outcomes_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_learn_methods" (
  "move_learn_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move learn method */,
  "move_learn_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the move learn method (e.g., level up, egg) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move learn method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_learn_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "pokemon_move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon's move */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "move_learn_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move learn method */,
  "level_learned" INTEGER /* Level at which the move is learned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_move_learn_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_learn_method_id") REFERENCES move_learn_methods ("move_learn_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)
